Function.Inference: Introductory waltz vamp establishing the key and rhythm before the melody.
Main looping body ending with a D.C. instruction to repeat the track.

Section.Inference: Introductory vamp preceding the main thematic material.
Primary 16-bar waltz period containing antecedent and consequent melodic phrases.
Contrasting section with a chromatic descending texture leading into the loop cadence.
